name: Points Ranking
des: During the event, participate in BOSS Carnival、Luxury Rouletteto earn Points; rewards sent by mail after event ends

name: Spending Ranking
des: During the event, ranked by Magic Stone spending; rewards sent by mail after event ends. Cumulative spending of 500000 Magic Stone qualifies for the leaderboard.

name: Holiday Quest
des: During the event, complete specified events daily to earn Points; claim rewards when Points reach the target. Points and rewards reset daily.

name: Double Rebate
des: During the event, single recharge returns double Magic Stone, resets daily

name: BOSS Carnival
des: During the event, defeat BOSS of level 30+ Personal, World, Divine, Phantom Forbidden, Demon Invasion, Lost Demon Domain to earn Points; owners earn more

name: Lucky Wheel
des: During the event, Based on Cumulative Recharge amount to obtain corresponding Wheel draws. Resets daily.

name: Character Collection Event
des: During the event, Defeat Level 30+ Personal/World/Divine/Phantom Forbidden/Demon Invasion/Lost Demon Domain BOSS owners to earn event characters; collect corresponding characters to exchange for rewards

name: Item Exchange
des: During the event, Collect the characters here to exchange for rewards.

name: First Recharge Reset
des: After the event starts, the First Recharge double function for each tier in the shop will be reset
